title: Hoofdstuk 17 - Toegankelijkheid: basis Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Alt-tekst, formlabels en semantische markup voor toegankelijkheid.

explanations.overview: Alt text ensures non-visual users understand image content.

byOptionId.access: Correct â€” alt text aids disabled users and provides fallback descriptions.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” styling is done with CSS, not alt attributes.
byOptionId.seoonly: Incorrect â€” while alt can help SEO, its primary purpose is accessibility.
byOptionId.optional: Incorrect â€” alt is important for accessibility and should usually be provided.

questions.prompt: Wat Their They Their They Their They Their

explanations.overview: Their They Their They Their They

byOptionId.label: Correct â€” <label> elements improve accessibility and clickable area for controls.
byOptionId.divs: Incorrect â€” wrapping in <div> alone does not provide the same semantics as <label>.
byOptionId.spans: Incorrect â€” <span> is not a replacement for a properly associated label.
byOptionId.none: Incorrect â€” proper labeling and semantics significantly improve accessibility.
